_comment: Calibration dataset for the Miner Performance Lab. currentRegime holds REAL goldenminer GPU prover v0.3.6 measurements (--mode=gpu, single card, NOCK pool) collected on vast.ai. These 7 points calibrate the current-zkPoW model in src/lib/miner-performance-model.ts (mirrored as MEASURED_BENCHMARKS in src/lib/miner-specs.ts; a test asserts they stay in sync). matmulPoUW is the AI-zkPOW (Fork A) calibration slot — populated later by the GEMM microbenchmark harness; until then the Fork A predictor uses spec-sheet tensor throughput and is labeled modeled/low-confidence.

methodology.metric: proofsPerSec (steady-state, averaged over several speed lines)

settingsEffects._comment: Approximate multipliers used by the model; refine with the bench harness.
